title: himantoglossum caprinum subsp. calcaratum
intro: Himantoglossum caprinum subsp. calcaratum, also known as the Italian orchid or the goat's tongue orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Himantoglossum. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Himantoglossum caprinum subsp. calcaratum include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
